subject: Montana's veterans deserve better from Steve Daines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
Steve Daines says he cares about our veterans, but his actions tell a different story.
Last month, Daines posed for pictures at the groundbreaking for the Southwest Montana Veterans Home in Butte after voting down funding for that very same veterans home.
[**Montana 's veterans deserve better than this kind of hypocrisy, team. Contribute $5 now to help send me to the Senate so I can fight for our veterans.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190812&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
I am a veteran myself, having served in the Army National Guard, the Army Reserves, and the Navy Reserves for more than twenty years. I know what it means to stand with our veterans. Veterans deserve everything they were promised when they enlisted and they shouldn't have to wait for care or be used as political props.
That's one of the reasons I am running for U.S. Senate. Veterans in Montana--and all over the country--need more leaders who truly understand their sacrifices and respond to their needs. Steve Daines is always ready for a photoshoot, but he's not willing or capable to do what's right for our veterans, so it's long past time to retire Steve Daines and deliver for our veterans.
[**Help me fight for our veterans in the Senate. Contribute $5 to my campaign now.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190812&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Wilmot

name: Jill Vogel
subject: Endorsement Alert!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100 Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
Virginia Professional Firefighters Endorse Senator Jill Vogel
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,
Virginia Professional Fire Fighters have just endorsed my campaign for re-election. I represent a huge number of professional fire fighters--more reside in my Senate district than in any other district in the Commonwealth. There are no braver or more hardworking men and women and it is an honor to work for them and to represent them. Synopsis of the endorsement is below.
"Senator Vogel has been a champion for fire fighters here in her district and across the Commonwealth of Virginia. She has proven her commitment to meeting the needs of our fire fighters through her extensive voting record on our issues. She was a chief patron of legislation to fix and expand our cancer presumption law, which protects fire fighter health and safety when they contract occupational cancers. Senator Vogel has also supported legislation protecting the Virginia Retirement System, protecting the Virginia Line of Duty Act, coverage for first responders under workers compensation for PTSD, increased protections for first responders in Virginia's Move Over Law, fire prevention code reform, and funding for localities for fire and rescue services.
For many years, Jill Vogel has stood with and had the backs of firefighters and we will continue to stand with her and have her back", said John Wright, Virginia Professional Fire Fighters and President of Frederick County Professional Fire Fighters Local 4145."
Thank you so much to the Virginia Professional Fire Fighters for your support in this 2019 senate election.
---
|
---
| Sincerely,
---
| | |
---|---
|

Senator Jill Vogel

Begin forwarded message from Dan Lipinski:**

The House has done their job.

For the first time in 12 years, the House passed legislation to raise the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour!

subject: Photos from last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/31hWm9-5S_TIHDvJQTHioKyWWagiHh1xxnZ6oH1uHI0=/-ZMixeu07GMTre8gu2ilvx9AglFSl-oG_yflB_fovIE=?refcode=BLU-footer)

---
Peter,

I'll keep this short. A few days ago, I sent out an email about Abigail's 40th birthday. So many of you signed her card -- it was heartwarming and she appreciated it!

With that said, if you didn't get a chance to sign her card before and wanted to, please feel free to sign it today! | | | [SIGN THE CARD](https://act.myngp.com/el/31hWm9-5S_TIHDvJQTHioKyWWagiHh1xxnZ6oH1uHI0=/diWRSM1NinjoYTMAYBdDQVSVcWBYXwtH492sNl2wSRs=)
---
Although her birthday was last week, the birthday celebrations continued throughout the weekend. We had a great crowd come out on Friday for a day in service - cleaning a park and a commuter lot and sorting goods at our regional food bank.

It's amazing how much celebrating Abigail's birthday has changed over the years. When we used to move with her old job, we spent birthdays in new cities surrounded by moving boxes with a small cake and jetlagged children. And last night, we celebrated with hundreds of community members whom we've gotten to know through political advocacy and community engagement.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/31hWm9-5S_TIHDvJQTHioKyWWagiHh1xxnZ6oH1uHI0=/diWRSM1NinjoYTMAYBdDQVSVcWBYXwtH492sNl2wSRs=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/31hWm9-5S_TIHDvJQTHioKyWWagiHh1xxnZ6oH1uHI0=/diWRSM1NinjoYTMAYBdDQVSVcWBYXwtH492sNl2wSRs=)
Thank you for all that you do to support Abigail and her work representing our community. Thank you for helping to make her 40th birthday fantastic!

[_**If you 'd like to sign Abigail's card, please feel free to do so!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/31hWm9-5S_TIHDvJQTHioKyWWagiHh1xxnZ6oH1uHI0=/diWRSM1NinjoYTMAYBdDQVSVcWBYXwtH492sNl2wSRs=) The notes and messages she's read so far mean a lot to her!
| | [SIGN THE CARD](https://act.myngp.com/el/31hWm9-5S_TIHDvJQTHioKyWWagiHh1xxnZ6oH1uHI0=/diWRSM1NinjoYTMAYBdDQVSVcWBYXwtH492sNl2wSRs=)
---
Thanks,
_Adam_

* * *

name: Jason Yates
subject: MFV labeled a “hate” organization
body:
| | Peter, As a valued friend and supporter of the ministry, I want you to be aware that My Faith Votes has been added to a list of “hate groups” by the organization Unite Here. Some of the other names on this list you might recognize:
* Alliance Defending Freedom
* Concerned Women for America
* Focus on the Family
* Religious Freedom Coalition

We are grateful to be lumped together with organizations who are committed to defending religious freedom, human life, marriage, and biblical values in our culture. Below is the notification postcard Unite Here sent to alert us that My Faith Votes had been added to their “hate” list. Jesus reminds us in John 15:18, “If the world hates you, know that it has hated me before it hated you.” And we are warned in 2 Timothy 3:12 that all who “desire to live godly in Christ Jesus will suffer persecution.” If standing for biblical truth means people label us as a ‘hate’ group, then so be it. I don’t know about you, but this only encourages the My Faith Votes team and me to work harder to see Christian principles advanced in the public square. It reminds us that we are engaged in a spiritual battle where two ideologies - a secular versus biblical worldview are at war. Please know that your gift today will help us press further and more aggressively to making a change in our culture for the things we believe are important to God, and for turning this nation to Him. **[Your donation will expand our work to see millions of Christians activated to change our culture](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190813apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190813apl01nd&n=1). **Together we can preserve our nation’s principles and ensure our country honors God. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190813apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190813apl01nd&n=2) Thank you for being a faithful friend to My Faith Votes and for boldly standing for biblical truth in your community and our nation. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190813apl01nd&n=3)

Friend,

It’s about giving every single Hoosier the opportunity to access to 21st century technologies that will lift up entire communities.

**Gov. Holcomb is excited to announce round one of our $100 million Next Level Broadband program, which is investing $22.1 million into 11 broadband expansion infrastructure projects throughout Indiana!**

As part of this investment, 4,800 homes and commercial locations in 12 counties will receive new access to broadband internet that will allow these Hoosier communities to connect with the world and reach their full potential.
[ **Add your name to support lifting up Hoosier communities** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=707891e5fba345269ce9e46dec3c462b&_e=I7FreYHCfO3QHt8P4ZH-Us4R11lu3uKpL5CrD3743IIVUyMxytKxNHbG6YQnWXzVLF1N65TRa301gZLA_dnaGZcQqh3U-3PxSq83m4uArE93Dn8VA6C396ve6fssFQkFnAkWpcFvSctdx13mH5vJx1eXpUa6f5DifWhrtGVYrspjaa-y5hZjRRN4b__BZE08fEINF5TMb3NyhqGKMIP3wpnMSR85FMbMRZFASbnLAl6JDdEGPtfvaCdqcccB8QRlBCQfBsPayBctW5-doY2A5z93mrS_oDlkZPcpeJTBFxQRWYB1ia6pK1zZa0QZ8N5_9EvPSxeUX2dE7SGaqGsLyH66h5gt328IEcf30sqDR9ielGzWWfZloww6eSOvClaSzCRAPVcrRqeWcb_U2uXJDpOjZLZMJxZ72KhBGQlOLqgr9xXMW8QMfVKtHbIB0Pvb)
Hoosiers need affordable, quality internet regardless of where they live, work or go to school. Access to broadband brings countless opportunities and that’s why Gov. Holcomb is excited to see these key infrastructure projects positively impact economic development, education, health, agriculture and quality of life. **It’s truly a game-changer for Hoosiers. **

**The $100 million Next Level Broadband program is the largest single state investment in broadband,** and the following counties and communities will benefit immediately: Bartholomew, Jennings, Shelby, Clark, Floyd, Howard, Tipton, Monroe, Noble, Perry, Spencer, Tippecanoe, Wayne.

**[If you support giving Hoosiers across our state access to 21st century technology that can radically transform their economic opportunities and quality of life, sign on today in support of Gov. Holcomb’s Next Level Broadband program.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=707891e5fba345269ce9e46dec3c462b&_e=I7FreYHCfO3QHt8P4ZH-Us4R11lu3uKpL5CrD3743IIVUyMxytKxNHbG6YQnWXzVLF1N65TRa301gZLA_dnaGZcQqh3U-3PxSq83m4uArE93Dn8VA6C396ve6fssFQkFnAkWpcFvSctdx13mH5vJx1eXpUa6f5DifWhrtGVYrspjaa-y5hZjRRN4b__BZE08fEINF5TMb3NyhqGKMIP3wpnMSR85FMbMRZFASbnLAl6WNB3i8ZzqMV8wk4Hs2inalG6hdEEYPAhatIGP8wjBzeEr7B6bhvZ5AzXrTi9gQK5zIG0CBTyjLqE9wKNd4y0GdLs6jP_44LoJXgF0JbxwnpqueUlD8J3K5ZBamx6KZg_V2EuRoSUzjTDWDN6aMmOc5xhRC6x9weUoNT6GYh6892PAMFKQkcVdFnvixBYi8XNsVMPsWj9tx7ZvRNU6dnjz)**
Thank you,
Holcomb Crew

body:

| Friend -- We just found out that Tom Steyer has reached the 130,000 donor threshold and is only one poll away from making the September debate stage. With Andrew Yang, Kamala Harris, Joe Biden, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, Pete Buttigieg, Beto O'Rourke, and Amy Klobuchar all qualified for the fall debates, **now is not the time for our campaign to fall behind.** We're $156,284 short of reaching $350,000, and there are only two days left until the big deadline. Will you step up and donate right now to help us get there? Here's a link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190813-em1**](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190813-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190813_CB_20190813-fr-CB-FTNbump-actives_actives_L1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you for all you do,
Cory _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Team, here's a quick update on how we're doing on our mid-month goal. **FIRST:** Last week, we set a goal to raise $100,000 by August 15th. **THEN:** This community surpassed that goal, so we increased it to $350,000. **NOW:** There are only three days left until the deadline, and we still have $173,827 to go. **[With only three days left to meet this ambitious mid-month goal, we'll need your help. Will you chip in to help us close the gap?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190813-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190813_CB_20190813-fr-CB-FTNbump-actives_actives_L2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Right after the last debate, we had the biggest grassroots fundraising day our campaign has seen in a 24 hour period, all thanks to this team. This is incredible, but it also means that all eyes are on this campaign to see if we can keep the momentum up or if we'll fall short. **And friend, we 're falling behind.** We know that there are going to be at least eight other candidates standing beside me in September -- Andrew Yang, Kamala Harris, Joe Biden, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, Pete Buttigieg, Beto O'Rourke, and Amy Klobuchar all qualified for the fall debates as well. Our campaign needs to stand out in this crowded field, and that means meeting every goal we set. **[So I'm asking, will you rush a donation right now to help us reach our mid-month goal of $350,000 by August 15th? We can't afford to fall behind.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190813-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190813_CB_20190813-fr-CB-FTNbump-actives_actives_L3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Cory [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190813-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190813_CB_20190813-fr-CB-FTNbump-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

| | **I 'm launching my first-ever TV ad in response to Trump's attacks on me, my family, and my community. _[I 'm asking you to take a second to watch it -- then share it with your communities. He smeared my family. He denigrated my community. **I won 't let his hateful attacks go unanswered.** So I'm launching the first TV ad of my entire campaign directed at him. | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcef0/3eb3e2fc/5da44c43/744bda41/2591326942/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro/status/1161246017787793409")
---

I need your help to share my ad and send this racist president a crystal-clear message:

When you refer to countries as "shitholes"...

When you call immigrants rapists...

When you come after our communities with your toxic, hateful message...

**We will always -- ALWAYS -- rise to the occasion to shut you down.**

[_**Will you share my ad with your friends and family on social media? Let 's make sure Donald Trump hears our powerful message. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcef0/3eb3e2fc/5da44c43/744bda41/2591326942/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro/status/1161246017787793409")

Julian

body:

Last week, Jim officially became our nominee for governor with nearly 70% of the primary vote. That's a huge win for our team and shows that Mississippians are ready for new leadership.
Friend,

Last week, Jim officially became our nominee for governor with _nearly 70% of the primary vote_. That's a huge win for our team and shows that Mississippians are ready for new leadership.

But our opposition saw how excited people were to go out and vote for Jim, and there's already an outside group running attack ads that slander Jim's character and spread lies about his record of standing up for the people of Mississippi. It's clear that they have a huge war chest, and to put it bluntly -- we're worried.

We need to start stockpiling resources now so that we can fight back and keep our positive message on the airwaves. **Can you chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help fight these lies?**

We're excited to be traveling to the early voting states, folks!

Traveling across the country and listening to your concerns is what this campaign is all about. We are committed to opening more opportunities for ALL Americans -- and we can't do that without being on the ground and talking with community members and voters directly.

[**Can you help us keep Tim on the road by chipping in $3? name: Tina Smith
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Become a citizen co-sponsor of the Democracy for All amendment to overturn Citizens United
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We need 5,000 citizen co-sponsors. Our records indicate your name isn't on our list yet. Will you join this fight?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190813citizensutd2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

I need 5,000 grassroots activists to be citizen co-sponsors of the _Democracy for All_ amendment to overturn _Citizens United_. We're at 3,126.

The _Citizens United_ decision unleashed a flood of unlimited corporate spending in our elections. Giving those with the most power -- corporations, special interests, and the wealthy -- _even more_ influence in our political system.

That's why I'm standing up with Democrats in the Senate to overturn this dangerous decision with our _Democracy for All_ amendment.

**[3,126 people have signed on as citizen co-sponsors so far, but our records indicate your name isn't on the list yet. Will you sign on and be a co-sponsor of our _Democracy for All_ amendment?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ef72/c1f7015/648a0d3f/1146e79c/2175148173/VEsE/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/democracy-for-all-amendment?source=em190813citizensutd2-full&recurring=auto")** **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ef72/c1f7015/648a0d3f/1146e79c/2175148173/VEsF/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/democracy-for-all-amendment?source=em190813citizensutd2-full&recurring=auto")** Elections should be decided by who has the best ideas and who can organize people behind them -- not who can write the biggest checks.

That is why I am fighting for the _Democracy for All_ amendment to overturn the unfair court ruling in _Citizens United_ and allow for Congress to set reasonable rules around corporate and special interest spending in elections.

**[Will you add your name today as a citizen co-sponsor and be part of the movement that puts the power back in the hands of everyday people? We cannot win this fight without everyone on this team.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4ef72/c1f7015/648a0d3f/1146e79c/2175148173/VEsC/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/democracy-for-all-amendment?source=em190813citizensutd2-full&recurring=auto")**

Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190813citizensutd2-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: Francis Conole
subject: why are drug prices so high?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
We want to hear from you, please take a look | [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | We live in a country where good people needlessly suffer because of soaring health insurance and drug costs. **It 's no secret why: drug companies invest millions in politicians like John Katko to stop anyone from lower drug costs and eating into their profits.**

Unlike Katko, we value what's best for people not what's profitable for drug companies. That's why we are reaching out to ask for your opinion.

[**Click here to let us know what you think about drug companies buying politicians like John Katko to keep prescription drug prices high:**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/survey-drug-prices?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+let+us+know+what+you+think&utm_campaign=FC_EM_SV_90DO_190813_1_1&source=FC_EM_SV_90DO_190813_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_SV_90DO_190813_1_1") [Drug prices are too high](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/survey-drug-prices?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Drug+prices+are+too+high&utm_campaign=FC_EM_SV_90DO_190813_1_1&source=FC_EM_SV_90DO_190813_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_SV_90DO_190813_1_1") We already know where Katko stands -- he voted against reforms that would have limited the power of health insurance and drug companies to influence our government.

**_Corporate backed politicians like John Katko aren 't going to stand up to the drug companies. But we will!_**

To lower drug prices, it's going to take all of us coming together and organizing a grassroots movement. That's why I'm reaching out to ask for your input.

[**Answer our drug prices survey now and let us know what you think about rising prices!**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/survey-drug-prices?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Answer+our+drug+prices+survey+now+and+le&utm_campaign=FC_EM_SV_90DO_190813_1_1&source=FC_EM_SV_90DO_190813_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_SV_90DO_190813_1_1")

Yours in service,

Francis

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I have big news to share with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
What I want you to know is this, friend: when we fight, we win. And if we do our work, the people will believe that power is theirs for the taking. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa53e/34a064cc/18079ba0/703c978/1898155718/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Faith has always been a part of who I am. And I believe the right of the people to elect their leaders is sacrosanct. When I announced the launch of Fair Fight last November, I did so after deep reflection about how I could best serve Georgia and our country. Because whether as an elected official or an active citizen, I believe we are required to find solutions to our most intractable problems and to use our skills to expand opportunity for all. I truly believe voter suppression is the fundamental issue of our time. And while we know that Georgia is ground-zero for voter suppression, our state is also the heart and soul of the civil rights movement and the decades-long fight for free and fair elections. [**That is why today, I announced the launch of Fair Fight 2020, an unprecedented effort to support and fund voter protection programs in 20 battleground states across the country.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa53e/34a064cc/18079ba0/703c979/1898155718/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight2020?refcode=IE081319SYAFFG") We are doing the work to protect the right to vote, but we need to scale our work nationwide to truly take on the insidious efforts to undermine our democracy. The myth of voter fraud has taken on the air of truth, but we must make certain the truth of voter suppression takes on the air of urgency. What I want you to know is this, friend: when we fight, we win. Thousands of people have signed up to be part of our movement for free and fair elections because they know that this is real and that we must act. And if we do our work, the people will believe that power is theirs for the taking. [**It is critical that we begin this work now, and I hope I can count on you to join me in this fight on day one. Will you support Fair Fight 2020 as a founding donor by making a contribution today?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa53e/34a064cc/18079ba0/703c979/1898155718/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight2020?refcode=IE081319SYAFFG") In 2020, years of strategic GOP legislative and political efforts to suppress the vote will be exacerbated by foreign interference, Trump's racist rhetoric, and a newly emboldened RNC, threatening our fundamental ability to freely elect our candidates, win the Senate, and defeat Trump. Our ability to win and govern as Democrats--to expand access to health care, education, and economic opportunity--depends on our ability to protect the people's voice through the ballot box. And by directly supporting and funding state parties and Democratic allies, we can help leverage their unique privileges to place observers inside polling locations and ensure free, fair elections for all citizens. We have more work to do. Let's get it done. Yours,
Stacey Abrams **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa53e/34a064cc/18079ba0/703c979/1898155718/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight2020?refcode=IE081319SYAFFG")**

"" In 2020, years of strategic GOP legislative and political efforts to suppress the vote will be exacerbated by foreign interference, Trump's racist rhetoric, and a newly emboldened RNC, threatening our fundamental ability to freely elect our candidates, win the Senate, and defeat Trump. Our ability to win and govern as Democrats--to expand access to health care, education, and economic opportunity--depends on our ability to protect the people's voice through the ballot box. And by directly supporting and funding state parties and Democratic allies, we can help leverage their unique privileges to place observers inside polling locations and ensure free, fair elections for all citizens. We have more work to do. Let's get it done. Yours, Stacey Abrams "" | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2018 Fair Fight, All rights reserved Contributions to Fair Fight are not tax-deductible. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:

---
| Team, look at this: [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190813-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190813_CB_20190813-fr-CB-newpoll-actives_actives_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Morning Consult is out with a new poll of likely voters in early primary states. In the almost two weeks since the last debate, we've shot into the top tier. In fact, we're now _tied_ with Pete Buttigieg, Kamala Harris, and Tom Steyer. I'll be the first to admit that a lot of people didn't see this coming. Many of the pollsters and pundits never thought we'd get this far with so many other candidates in the race. When you're an underdog campaign, breaking through in a field of well-funded frontrunners often seems impossible. **But we 're proving that when people come together and fight for something bigger than themselves, anything is possible.** This poll is just one more sign that our campaign has real momentum. What we all do right now will determine if we can keep it going. We're $102,561 short of our mid-month fundraising goal with just a few days left -- this is one we can't afford to miss. **[Will you chip in right now and help our campaign turn the corner and ride this momentum?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190813-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190813_CB_20190813-fr-CB-newpoll-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Let's meet this moment together, Cory _PS - We might not have the fundraising advantages of candidates like Pete, Kamala, and Tom but we're now joining them in the top tier. That's because of you._**_Thank you._** [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190813-em2?refcode=em_fr_20190813_CB_20190813-fr-CB-newpoll-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
